001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
023import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal.ConverterUtils.*;
024
025import java.util.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller.*;
029
030/**
031 * Describes a single operation parameter.
032 *
033 * <p>
034 * The Parameter Object describes a single parameter used in a Swagger 2.0 API operation. A unique parameter is
035 * defined by a combination of a name and location (in). Parameters can be passed in various locations including
036 * the path, query string, headers, body, or form data.
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>Swagger Specification:</h5>
039 * <p>
040 * The Parameter Object supports the following fields:
041 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
042 *    <li><c>name</c> (string, REQUIRED) - The name of the parameter
043 *    <li><c>in</c> (string, REQUIRED) - The location of the parameter. Possible values: <js>"path"</js>, <js>"query"</js>, <js>"header"</js>, <js>"body"</js>, or <js>"formData"</js>
044 *    <li><c>description</c> (string) - A brief description of the parameter
045 *    <li><c>required</c> (boolean) - Determines whether this parameter is mandatory (must be <jk>true</jk> if <c>in</c> is <js>"path"</js>)
046 *    <li><c>schema</c> ({@link SchemaInfo}) - The schema defining the type used for the body parameter (only if <c>in</c> is <js>"body"</js>)
047 *    <li><c>type</c> (string) - The type of the parameter (for non-body parameters). Values: <js>"string"</js>, <js>"number"</js>, <js>"integer"</js>, <js>"boolean"</js>, <js>"array"</js>, <js>"file"</js>
048 *    <li><c>format</c> (string) - The format modifier (e.g., <js>"int32"</js>, <js>"int64"</js>, <js>"float"</js>, <js>"double"</js>, <js>"date"</js>, <js>"date-time"</js>)
049 *    <li><c>allowEmptyValue</c> (boolean) - Sets the ability to pass empty-valued parameters (valid only for <js>"query"</js> or <js>"formData"</js> parameters)
050 *    <li><c>items</c> ({@link Items}) - Required if type is <js>"array"</js>. Describes the type of items in the array
051 *    <li><c>collectionFormat</c> (string) - How multiple values are formatted. Values: <js>"csv"</js>, <js>"ssv"</js>, <js>"tsv"</js>, <js>"pipes"</js>, <js>"multi"</js>
052 *    <li><c>default</c> (any) - The default value
053 *    <li><c>maximum</c> (number), <c>exclusiveMaximum</c> (boolean), <c>minimum</c> (number), <c>exclusiveMinimum</c> (boolean) - Numeric constraints
054 *    <li><c>maxLength</c> (integer), <c>minLength</c> (integer), <c>pattern</c> (string) - String constraints
055 *    <li><c>maxItems</c> (integer), <c>minItems</c> (integer), <c>uniqueItems</c> (boolean) - Array constraints
056 *    <li><c>enum</c> (array) - Possible values for this parameter
057 *    <li><c>multipleOf</c> (number) - Must be a multiple of this value
058 * </ul>
059 *
060 * <p>
061 * There are five possible parameter types (determined by the <c>in</c> field):
062 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
063 *    <li><js>"path"</js> - Used together with Path Templating, where the parameter value is actually part of the
064 *       operation's URL.
065 *       This does not include the host or base path of the API.
066 *       For example, in <c>/items/{itemId}</c>, the path parameter is <c>itemId</c>.
067 *    <li><js>"query"</js> - Parameters that are appended to the URL.
068 *       For example, in <c>/items?id=###</c>, the query parameter is <c>id</c>.
069 *    <li><js>"header"</js> - Custom headers that are expected as part of the request.
070 *    <li><js>"body"</js> - The payload that's appended to the HTTP request.
071 *       Since there can only be one payload, there can only be one body parameter.
072 *       The name of the body parameter has no effect on the parameter itself and is used for documentation purposes
073 *       only.
074 *       Since Form parameters are also in the payload, body and form parameters cannot exist together for the same
075 *       operation.
076 *    <li><js>"formData"</js> - Used to describe the payload of an HTTP request when either
077 *       <c>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</c>, <c>multipart/form-data</c> or both are used as the
078 *       content type of the request (in Swagger's definition, the consumes property of an operation).
079 *       This is the only parameter type that can be used to send files, thus supporting the file type.
080 *       Since form parameters are sent in the payload, they cannot be declared together with a body parameter for the
081 *       same operation.
082 *       Form parameters have a different format based on the content-type used (for further details, consult
083 *       <c>http://www.w3.org/TR/html401/interact/forms.html#h-17.13.4</c>):
084 *       <ul>
085 *          <li><js>"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"</js> - Similar to the format of Query parameters but as a
086 *             payload.
087 *             For example, <c>foo=1&amp;bar=swagger</c> - both <c>foo</c> and <c>bar</c> are form
088 *             parameters.
089 *             This is normally used for simple parameters that are being transferred.
090 *          <li><js>"multipart/form-data"</js> - each parameter takes a section in the payload with an internal header.
091 *             For example, for the header <c>Content-Disposition: form-data; name="submit-name"</c> the name of
092 *             the parameter is <c>submit-name</c>.
093 *             This type of form parameters is more commonly used for file transfers.
094 *       </ul>
095 *    </li>
096 * </ul>
097 *
098 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
099 * <p class='bjava'>
100 *    <jc>// Construct using SwaggerBuilder.</jc>
101 *    ParameterInfo <jv>info</jv> = <jsm>parameterInfo</jsm>(<js>"query"</js>, <js>"foo"</js>);
102 *
103 *    <jc>// Serialize using JsonSerializer.</jc>
104 *    String <jv>json</jv> = Json.<jsm>from</jsm>(<jv>info</jv>);
105 *
106 *    <jc>// Or just use toString() which does the same as above.</jc>
107 *    <jv>json</jv> = <jv>info</jv>.toString();
108 * </p>
109 * <p class='bjson'>
110 *    <jc>// Output</jc>
111 *    {
112 *       <js>"in"</js>: <js>"query"</js>,
113 *       <js>"name"</js>: <js>"foo"</js>
114 *    }
115 * </p>
116 *
117 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
118 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2/#parameter-object">Swagger 2.0 Specification &gt; Parameter Object</a>
119 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/docs/specification/2-0/describing-parameters/">Swagger Describing Parameters</a>
120 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanSwagger2">juneau-bean-swagger-v2</a>
121 * </ul>
122 */
123@SuppressWarnings({
124   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
125   "java:S116", // Field names use trailing underscore (default_, enum_) to avoid Java keyword conflicts
126})
127public class ParameterInfo extends SwaggerElement {
128
129   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
130   private static final String ARG_property = "property";
131
132   // Property name constants
133   private static final String PROP_allowEmptyValue = "allowEmptyValue";
134   private static final String PROP_collectionFormat = "collectionFormat";
135   private static final String PROP_default = "default";
136   private static final String PROP_description = "description";
137   private static final String PROP_example = "example";
138   private static final String PROP_examples = "examples";
139   private static final String PROP_exclusiveMaximum = "exclusiveMaximum";
140   private static final String PROP_exclusiveMinimum = "exclusiveMinimum";
141   private static final String PROP_format = "format";
142   private static final String PROP_items = "items";
143   private static final String PROP_maximum = "maximum";
144   private static final String PROP_maxItems = "maxItems";
145   private static final String PROP_maxLength = "maxLength";
146   private static final String PROP_minimum = "minimum";
147   private static final String PROP_minItems = "minItems";
148   private static final String PROP_minLength = "minLength";
149   private static final String PROP_multipleOf = "multipleOf";
150   private static final String PROP_pattern = "pattern";
151   private static final String PROP_required = "required";
152   private static final String PROP_schema = "schema";
153   private static final String PROP_enum = "enum";
154   private static final String PROP_in = "in";
155   private static final String PROP_name = "name";
156   private static final String PROP_type = "type";
157   private static final String PROP_uniqueItems = "uniqueItems";
158
159   private static final String[] VALID_IN = { "query", "header", "path", "formData", "body" };
160   private static final String[] VALID_TYPES = { "string", "number", "integer", "boolean", "array", "file" };
161   private static final String[] VALID_COLLECTION_FORMATS = { "csv", "ssv", "tsv", "pipes", "multi" };
162
163   private String name;
164   private String in;
165   private String description;
166   private String type;
167   private String format;
168   private String pattern;
169   private String collectionFormat;
170   private Number maximum;
171   private Number minimum;
172   private Number multipleOf;
173   private Integer maxLength;
174   private Integer minLength;
175   private Integer maxItems;
176   private Integer minItems;
177   private Boolean required;
178   private Boolean allowEmptyValue;
179   private Boolean exclusiveMaximum;
180   private Boolean exclusiveMinimum;
181   private Boolean uniqueItems;
182   private SchemaInfo schema;
183   private Items items;
184   private Object default_;
185   private Set<Object> enum_ = new LinkedHashSet<>();
186   private Object example;
187   private Map<String,String> examples;
188
189   /**
190    * Default constructor.
191    */
192   public ParameterInfo() {}
193
194   /**
195    * Copy constructor.
196    *
197    * @param copyFrom The object to copy.
198    */
199   public ParameterInfo(ParameterInfo copyFrom) {
200      super(copyFrom);
201
202      this.allowEmptyValue = copyFrom.allowEmptyValue;
203      this.collectionFormat = copyFrom.collectionFormat;
204      this.default_ = copyFrom.default_;
205      this.description = copyFrom.description;
206      this.enum_.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.enum_));
207      this.example = copyFrom.example;
208      this.exclusiveMaximum = copyFrom.exclusiveMaximum;
209      this.exclusiveMinimum = copyFrom.exclusiveMinimum;
210      this.format = copyFrom.format;
211      this.in = copyFrom.in;
212      this.items = copyFrom.items == null ? null : copyFrom.items.copy();
213      this.maximum = copyFrom.maximum;
214      this.maxItems = copyFrom.maxItems;
215      this.maxLength = copyFrom.maxLength;
216      this.minimum = copyFrom.minimum;
217      this.minItems = copyFrom.minItems;
218      this.minLength = copyFrom.minLength;
219      this.multipleOf = copyFrom.multipleOf;
220      this.name = copyFrom.name;
221      this.pattern = copyFrom.pattern;
222      this.required = copyFrom.required;
223      this.schema = copyFrom.schema == null ? null : copyFrom.schema.copy();
224      this.type = copyFrom.type;
225      this.uniqueItems = copyFrom.uniqueItems;
226
227      this.examples = copyOf(copyFrom.examples);
228   }
229
230   /**
231    * Bean property appender:  <property>enum</property>.
232    *
233    * @param value
234    *    The values to add to this property.
235    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
236    * @return This object.
237    */
238   public ParameterInfo addEnum(Object...value) {
239      if (nn(value))
240         for (var v : value)
241            if (nn(v))
242               enum_.add(v);
243      return this;
244   }
245
246   /**
247    * Make a deep copy of this object.
248    *
249    * @return A deep copy of this object.
250    */
251   public ParameterInfo copy() {
252      return new ParameterInfo(this);
253   }
254
255   /**
256    * Copies any non-null fields from the specified object to this object.
257    *
258    * @param p
259    *    The object to copy fields from.
260    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
261    * @return This object.
262    */
263   @SuppressWarnings({
264      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this logic
265   })
266   public ParameterInfo copyFrom(ParameterInfo p) {
267      if (nn(p)) {
268         if (nn(p.name))
269            name = p.name;
270         if (nn(p.in))
271            in = p.in;
272         if (nn(p.description))
273            description = p.description;
274         if (nn(p.type))
275            type = p.type;
276         if (nn(p.format))
277            format = p.format;
278         if (nn(p.pattern))
279            pattern = p.pattern;
280         if (nn(p.collectionFormat))
281            collectionFormat = p.collectionFormat;
282         if (nn(p.maximum))
283            maximum = p.maximum;
284         if (nn(p.minimum))
285            minimum = p.minimum;
286         if (nn(p.multipleOf))
287            multipleOf = p.multipleOf;
288         if (nn(p.maxLength))
289            maxLength = p.maxLength;
290         if (nn(p.minLength))
291            minLength = p.minLength;
292         if (nn(p.maxItems))
293            maxItems = p.maxItems;
294         if (nn(p.minItems))
295            minItems = p.minItems;
296         if (nn(p.required))
297            required = p.required;
298         if (nn(p.allowEmptyValue))
299            allowEmptyValue = p.allowEmptyValue;
300         if (nn(p.exclusiveMaximum))
301            exclusiveMaximum = p.exclusiveMaximum;
302         if (nn(p.exclusiveMinimum))
303            exclusiveMinimum = p.exclusiveMinimum;
304         if (nn(p.uniqueItems))
305            uniqueItems = p.uniqueItems;
306         if (nn(p.schema))
307            schema = p.schema;
308         if (nn(p.items))
309            items = p.items;
310         if (nn(p.default_))
311            default_ = p.default_;
312         enum_ = p.enum_;
313         if (nn(p.example))
314            example = p.example;
315         if (nn(p.examples))
316            examples = p.examples;
317      }
318      return this;
319   }
320
321   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
322   public <T> T get(String property, Class<T> type) {
323      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
324      return switch (property) {
325         case PROP_allowEmptyValue -> toType(getAllowEmptyValue(), type);
326         case PROP_collectionFormat -> toType(getCollectionFormat(), type);
327         case PROP_default -> toType(getDefault(), type);
328         case PROP_description -> toType(getDescription(), type);
329         case PROP_enum -> toType(getEnum(), type);
330         case PROP_example -> toType(getExample(), type);
331         case PROP_examples -> toType(getExamples(), type);
332         case PROP_exclusiveMaximum -> toType(getExclusiveMaximum(), type);
333         case PROP_exclusiveMinimum -> toType(getExclusiveMinimum(), type);
334         case PROP_format -> toType(getFormat(), type);
335         case PROP_in -> toType(getIn(), type);
336         case PROP_items -> toType(getItems(), type);
337         case PROP_maximum -> toType(getMaximum(), type);
338         case PROP_maxItems -> toType(getMaxItems(), type);
339         case PROP_maxLength -> toType(getMaxLength(), type);
340         case PROP_minimum -> toType(getMinimum(), type);
341         case PROP_minItems -> toType(getMinItems(), type);
342         case PROP_minLength -> toType(getMinLength(), type);
343         case PROP_multipleOf -> toType(getMultipleOf(), type);
344         case PROP_name -> toType(getName(), type);
345         case PROP_pattern -> toType(getPattern(), type);
346         case PROP_required -> toType(getRequired(), type);
347         case PROP_schema -> toType(getSchema(), type);
348         case PROP_type -> toType(getType(), type);
349         case PROP_uniqueItems -> toType(getUniqueItems(), type);
350         default -> super.get(property, type);
351      };
352   }
353
354   /**
355    * Bean property getter:  <property>allowEmptyValue</property>.
356    *
357    * <p>
358    * Sets the ability to pass empty-valued parameters.
359    *
360    * <p>
361    * This is valid only for either <c>query</c> or <c>formData</c> parameters and allows you to send a
362    * parameter with a name only or an empty value.
363    *
364    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
365    */
366   public Boolean getAllowEmptyValue() { return allowEmptyValue; }
367
368   /**
369    * Bean property getter:  <property>collectionFormat</property>.
370    *
371    * <p>
372    * Determines the format of the array if type array is used.
373    *
374    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
375    */
376   public String getCollectionFormat() { return collectionFormat; }
377
378   /**
379    * Bean property getter:  <property>default</property>.
380    *
381    * <p>
382    * Declares the value of the parameter that the server will use if none is provided, for example a <js>"count"</js>
383    * to control the number of results per page might default to 100 if not supplied by the client in the request.
384    *
385    * (Note: <js>"default"</js> has no meaning for required parameters.)
386    * Unlike JSON Schema this value MUST conform to the defined <c>type</c> for this parameter.
387    *
388    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
389    */
390   public Object getDefault() { return default_; }
391
392   /**
393    * Bean property getter:  <property>description</property>.
394    *
395    * <p>
396    * A brief description of the parameter.
397    *
398    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
399    */
400   public String getDescription() { return description; }
401
402   /**
403    * Bean property getter:  <property>enum</property>.
404    *
405    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
406    */
407   public Set<Object> getEnum() { return nullIfEmpty(enum_); }
408
409   /**
410    * Bean property getter:  <property>example</property>.
411    *
412    * <p>
413    * An example of the parameter. This is useful for documentation purposes.
414    *
415    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
416    */
417   public Object getExample() { return example; }
418
419   /**
420    * Bean property getter:  <property>examples</property>.
421    *
422    * <p>
423    * Examples of the parameter. This is useful for documentation purposes.
424    *
425    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
426    */
427   public Map<String,String> getExamples() { return examples; }
428
429   /**
430    * Bean property getter:  <property>exclusiveMaximum</property>.
431    *
432    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
433    */
434   public Boolean getExclusiveMaximum() { return exclusiveMaximum; }
435
436   /**
437    * Bean property getter:  <property>exclusiveMinimum</property>.
438    *
439    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
440    */
441   public Boolean getExclusiveMinimum() { return exclusiveMinimum; }
442
443   /**
444    * Bean property getter:  <property>format</property>.
445    *
446    * <p>
447    * The extending format for the previously mentioned type.
448    *
449    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
450    */
451   public String getFormat() { return format; }
452
453   /**
454    * Bean property getter:  <property>in</property>.
455    *
456    * <p>
457    * The location of the parameter.
458    *
459    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
460    */
461   public String getIn() { return in; }
462
463   /**
464    * Bean property getter:  <property>items</property>.
465    *
466    * <p>
467    * Describes the type of items in the array.
468    *
469    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
470    */
471   public Items getItems() { return items; }
472
473   /**
474    * Bean property getter:  <property>maximum</property>.
475    *
476    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
477    */
478   public Number getMaximum() { return maximum; }
479
480   /**
481    * Bean property getter:  <property>maxItems</property>.
482    *
483    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
484    */
485   public Integer getMaxItems() { return maxItems; }
486
487   /**
488    * Bean property getter:  <property>maxLength</property>.
489    *
490    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
491    */
492   public Integer getMaxLength() { return maxLength; }
493
494   /**
495    * Bean property getter:  <property>minimum</property>.
496    *
497    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
498    */
499   public Number getMinimum() { return minimum; }
500
501   /**
502    * Bean property getter:  <property>minItems</property>.
503    *
504    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
505    */
506   public Integer getMinItems() { return minItems; }
507
508   /**
509    * Bean property getter:  <property>minLength</property>.
510    *
511    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
512    */
513   public Integer getMinLength() { return minLength; }
514
515   /**
516    * Bean property getter:  <property>multipleOf</property>.
517    *
518    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
519    */
520   public Number getMultipleOf() { return multipleOf; }
521
522   /**
523    * Bean property getter:  <property>name</property>.
524    *
525    * <p>
526    * The name of the parameter.
527    *
528    * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
529    *    <li class='note'>
530    *       Parameter names are case sensitive.
531    *    <li class='note'>
532    *       If <c>in</c> is <js>"path"</js>, the <c>name</c> field MUST correspond to the associated path segment
533    *       from the <c>path</c> field in the <a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2#pathsObject">Paths Object</a>.
534    *    <li class='note'>
535    *       For all other cases, the name corresponds to the parameter name used based on the <c>in</c> property.
536    * </ul>
537    *
538    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
539    */
540   public String getName() { return name; }
541
542   /**
543    * Bean property getter:  <property>pattern</property>.
544    *
545    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
546    */
547   public String getPattern() { return pattern; }
548
549   /**
550    * Bean property getter:  <property>required</property>.
551    *
552    * <p>
553    * Determines whether this parameter is mandatory.
554    *
555    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
556    */
557   public Boolean getRequired() { return required; }
558
559   /**
560    * Bean property getter:  <property>schema</property>.
561    *
562    * <p>
563    * The schema defining the type used for the body parameter.
564    *
565    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
566    */
567   public SchemaInfo getSchema() { return schema; }
568
569   /**
570    * Bean property getter:  <property>type</property>.
571    *
572    * <p>
573    * The type of the parameter.
574    *
575    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
576    */
577   public String getType() { return type; }
578
579   /**
580    * Bean property getter:  <property>uniqueItems</property>.
581    *
582    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
583    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
584    */
585   public Boolean getUniqueItems() { return uniqueItems; }
586
587   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
588   public Set<String> keySet() {
589      // @formatter:off
590      var s = setb(String.class)
591         .addIf(nn(allowEmptyValue), PROP_allowEmptyValue)
592         .addIf(nn(collectionFormat), PROP_collectionFormat)
593         .addIf(nn(default_), PROP_default)
594         .addIf(nn(description), PROP_description)
595         .addIf(ne(enum_), PROP_enum)
596         .addIf(nn(example), PROP_example)
597         .addIf(nn(examples), PROP_examples)
598         .addIf(nn(exclusiveMaximum), PROP_exclusiveMaximum)
599         .addIf(nn(exclusiveMinimum), PROP_exclusiveMinimum)
600         .addIf(nn(format), PROP_format)
601         .addIf(nn(in), PROP_in)
602         .addIf(nn(items), PROP_items)
603         .addIf(nn(maxItems), PROP_maxItems)
604         .addIf(nn(maxLength), PROP_maxLength)
605         .addIf(nn(maximum), PROP_maximum)
606         .addIf(nn(minItems), PROP_minItems)
607         .addIf(nn(minLength), PROP_minLength)
608         .addIf(nn(minimum), PROP_minimum)
609         .addIf(nn(multipleOf), PROP_multipleOf)
610         .addIf(nn(name), PROP_name)
611         .addIf(nn(pattern), PROP_pattern)
612         .addIf(nn(required), PROP_required)
613         .addIf(nn(schema), PROP_schema)
614         .addIf(nn(type), PROP_type)
615         .addIf(nn(uniqueItems), PROP_uniqueItems)
616         .build();
617      // @formatter:on
618      return new MultiSet<>(s, super.keySet());
619   }
620
621   /**
622    * Resolves any <js>"$ref"</js> attributes in this element.
623    *
624    * @param swagger The swagger document containing the definitions.
625    * @param refStack Keeps track of previously-visited references so that we don't cause recursive loops.
626    * @param maxDepth
627    *    The maximum depth to resolve references.
628    *    <br>After that level is reached, <c>$ref</c> references will be left alone.
629    *    <br>Useful if you have very complex models and you don't want your swagger page to be overly-complex.
630    * @return
631    *    This object with references resolved.
632    *    <br>May or may not be the same object.
633    */
634   public ParameterInfo resolveRefs(Swagger swagger, Deque<String> refStack, int maxDepth) {
635
636      if (nn(schema))
637         schema = schema.resolveRefs(swagger, refStack, maxDepth);
638
639      if (nn(items))
640         items = items.resolveRefs(swagger, refStack, maxDepth);
641
642      return this;
643   }
644
645   @SuppressWarnings({
646      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for Swagger operations
647   })
648   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
649   public ParameterInfo set(String property, Object value) {
650      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
651      return switch (property) {
652         case PROP_allowEmptyValue -> setAllowEmptyValue(toBoolean(value));
653         case PROP_collectionFormat -> setCollectionFormat(s(value));
654         case PROP_default -> setDefault(value);
655         case PROP_description -> setDescription(s(value));
656         case PROP_enum -> setEnum(value);
657         case PROP_example -> setExample(value);
658         case PROP_examples -> setExamples(toType(value, Map.class));
659         case PROP_exclusiveMaximum -> setExclusiveMaximum(toBoolean(value));
660         case PROP_exclusiveMinimum -> setExclusiveMinimum(toBoolean(value));
661         case PROP_format -> setFormat(s(value));
662         case PROP_in -> setIn(s(value));
663         case PROP_items -> setItems(toType(value, Items.class));
664         case PROP_maximum -> setMaximum(toNumber(value));
665         case PROP_maxItems -> setMaxItems(toInteger(value));
666         case PROP_maxLength -> setMaxLength(toInteger(value));
667         case PROP_minimum -> setMinimum(toNumber(value));
668         case PROP_minItems -> setMinItems(toInteger(value));
669         case PROP_minLength -> setMinLength(toInteger(value));
670         case PROP_multipleOf -> setMultipleOf(toNumber(value));
671         case PROP_name -> setName(s(value));
672         case PROP_pattern -> setPattern(s(value));
673         case PROP_required -> setRequired(toBoolean(value));
674         case PROP_schema -> setSchema(toType(value, SchemaInfo.class));
675         case PROP_type -> setType(s(value));
676         case PROP_uniqueItems -> setUniqueItems(toBoolean(value));
677         default -> {
678            super.set(property, value);
679            yield this;
680         }
681      };
682   }
683
684   /**
685    * Bean property setter:  <property>allowEmptyValue</property>.
686    *
687    * <p>
688    * Sets the ability to pass empty-valued parameters.
689    *
690    * @param value
691    *    The new value for this property.
692    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
693    *    <br>Default is <jk>false</jk>.
694    * @return This object.
695    */
696   public ParameterInfo setAllowEmptyValue(Boolean value) {
697      allowEmptyValue = value;
698      return this;
699   }
700
701   /**
702    * Bean property setter:  <property>collectionFormat</property>.
703    *
704    * <p>
705    * Determines the format of the array if type array is used.
706    *
707    * @param value
708    *    The new value for this property.
709    *    <br>Valid values:
710    *    <ul>
711    *       <li><js>"csv"</js> (default) - comma separated values <c>foo,bar</c>.
712    *       <li><js>"ssv"</js> - space separated values <c>foo bar</c>.
713    *       <li><js>"tsv"</js> - tab separated values <c>foo\tbar</c>.
714    *       <li><js>"pipes"</js> - pipe separated values <c>foo|bar</c>.
715    *       <li><js>"multi"</js> - corresponds to multiple parameter instances instead of multiple values for a single
716    *          instance <c>foo=bar&amp;foo=baz</c>.
717    *          <br>This is valid only for parameters <c>in</c> <js>"query"</js> or <js>"formData"</js>.
718    *    </ul>
719    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
720    * @return This object.
721    */
722   public ParameterInfo setCollectionFormat(String value) {
723      if (isStrict() && ! contains(value, VALID_COLLECTION_FORMATS))
724         throw rex("Invalid value passed in to setCollectionFormat(String).  Value=''{0}'', valid values={1}", value, Json5.DEFAULT.of(VALID_COLLECTION_FORMATS));
725      collectionFormat = value;
726      return this;
727   }
728
729   /**
730    * Bean property setter:  <property>default</property>.
731    *
732    * <p>
733    * Declares the value of the parameter that the server will use if none is provided, for example a <js>"count"</js>
734    * to control the number of results per page might default to 100 if not supplied by the client in the request.
735    * (Note: <js>"default"</js> has no meaning for required parameters.)
736    * Unlike JSON Schema this value MUST conform to the defined <c>type</c> for this parameter.
737    *
738    * @param value The new value for this property.
739    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
740    * @return This object.
741    */
742   public ParameterInfo setDefault(Object value) {
743      default_ = value;
744      return this;
745   }
746
747   /**
748    * Bean property setter:  <property>description</property>.
749    *
750    * <p>
751    * A brief description of the parameter.
752    *
753    * @param value
754    *    The new value for this property.
755    *    <br><a class="doclink" href="https://help.github.com/articles/github-flavored-markdown">GFM syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.
756    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
757    * @return This object.
758    */
759   public ParameterInfo setDescription(String value) {
760      description = value;
761      return this;
762   }
763
764   /**
765    * Bean property setter:  <property>enum</property>.
766    *
767    * @param value
768    *    The new value for this property.
769    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
770    * @return This object.
771    */
772   public ParameterInfo setEnum(Collection<Object> value) {
773      enum_.clear();
774      if (nn(value))
775         enum_.addAll(value);
776      return this;
777   }
778
779   /**
780    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>enum</property>.
781    *
782    * @param value
783    *    The new value for this property.
784    *    <br>Strings can be JSON arrays.
785    * @return This object.
786    */
787   public ParameterInfo setEnum(Object...value) {
788      setEnum(setb(Object.class).sparse().addAny(value).build());
789      return this;
790   }
791
792   /**
793    * Bean property setter:  <property>example</property>.
794    *
795    * <p>
796    * An example of the parameter. This is useful for documentation purposes.
797    *
798    * @param value
799    *    The new value for this property.
800    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
801    * @return This object.
802    */
803   public ParameterInfo setExample(Object value) {
804      example = value;
805      return this;
806   }
807
808   /**
809    * Bean property setter:  <property>examples</property>.
810    *
811    * <p>
812    * Examples of the parameter. This is useful for documentation purposes.
813    *
814    * @param value
815    *    The new value for this property.
816    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
817    * @return This object.
818    */
819   public ParameterInfo setExamples(Map<String,String> value) {
820      examples = value;
821      return this;
822   }
823
824   /**
825    * Bean property setter:  <property>exclusiveMaximum</property>.
826    *
827    * @param value The new value for this property.
828    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
829    * @return This object.
830    */
831   public ParameterInfo setExclusiveMaximum(Boolean value) {
832      exclusiveMaximum = value;
833      return this;
834   }
835
836   /**
837    * Bean property setter:  <property>exclusiveMinimum</property>.
838    *
839    * @param value The new value for this property.
840    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
841    * @return This object.
842    */
843   public ParameterInfo setExclusiveMinimum(Boolean value) {
844      exclusiveMinimum = value;
845      return this;
846   }
847
848   /**
849    * Bean property setter:  <property>format</property>.
850    *
851    * <p>
852    * The extending format for the previously mentioned type.
853    *
854    * @param value The new value for this property.
855    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
856    * @return This object.
857    */
858   public ParameterInfo setFormat(String value) {
859      format = value;
860      return this;
861   }
862
863   /**
864    * Bean property setter:  <property>in</property>.
865    *
866    * <p>
867    * The location of the parameter.
868    *
869    * @param value
870    *    The new value for this property.
871    *    <br>Valid values:
872    *    <ul>
873    *       <li><js>"query"</js>
874    *       <li><js>"header"</js>
875    *       <li><js>"path"</js>
876    *       <li><js>"formData"</js>
877    *       <li><js>"body"</js>
878    *    </ul>
879    *    <br>Property value is required.
880    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
881    * @return This object.
882    */
883   public ParameterInfo setIn(String value) {
884      if (isStrict() && ! contains(value, VALID_IN))
885         throw rex("Invalid value passed in to setIn(String).  Value=''{0}'', valid values={1}", value, Json5.DEFAULT.of(VALID_IN));
886      in = value;
887      if ("path".equals(value))
888         required = true;
889      return this;
890   }
891
892   /**
893    * Bean property setter:  <property>items</property>.
894    *
895    * <p>
896    * Describes the type of items in the array.
897    *
898    * @param value
899    *    The new value for this property.
900    *    <br>Property value is required if <c>type</c> is <js>"array"</js>.
901    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
902    * @return This object.
903    */
904   public ParameterInfo setItems(Items value) {
905      items = value;
906      return this;
907   }
908
909   /**
910    * Bean property setter:  <property>maximum</property>.
911    *
912    * @param value The new value for this property.
913    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
914    * @return This object.
915    */
916   public ParameterInfo setMaximum(Number value) {
917      maximum = value;
918      return this;
919   }
920
921   /**
922    * Bean property setter:  <property>maxItems</property>.
923    *
924    * @param value The new value for this property.
925    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
926    * @return This object.
927    */
928   public ParameterInfo setMaxItems(Integer value) {
929      maxItems = value;
930      return this;
931   }
932
933   /**
934    * Bean property setter:  <property>maxLength</property>.
935    *
936    * @param value The new value for this property.
937    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
938    * @return This object.
939    */
940   public ParameterInfo setMaxLength(Integer value) {
941      maxLength = value;
942      return this;
943   }
944
945   /**
946    * Bean property setter:  <property>minimum</property>.
947    *
948    * @param value The new value for this property.
949    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
950    * @return This object.
951    */
952   public ParameterInfo setMinimum(Number value) {
953      minimum = value;
954      return this;
955   }
956
957   /**
958    * Bean property setter:  <property>minItems</property>.
959    *
960    * @param value The new value for this property.
961    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
962    * @return This object.
963    */
964   public ParameterInfo setMinItems(Integer value) {
965      minItems = value;
966      return this;
967   }
968
969   /**
970    * Bean property setter:  <property>minLength</property>.
971    *
972    * @param value The new value for this property.
973    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
974    * @return This object.
975    */
976   public ParameterInfo setMinLength(Integer value) {
977      minLength = value;
978      return this;
979   }
980
981   /**
982    * Bean property setter:  <property>multipleOf</property>.
983    *
984    * @param value
985    *    The new value for this property.
986    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
987    * @return This object.
988    */
989   public ParameterInfo setMultipleOf(Number value) {
990      multipleOf = value;
991      return this;
992   }
993
994   /**
995    * Bean property setter:  <property>name</property>.
996    *
997    * <p>
998    * The name of the parameter.
999    *
1000    * @param value
1001    *    The new value for this property.
1002    *    <br>Property value is required.
1003    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1004    * @return This object.
1005    */
1006   public ParameterInfo setName(String value) {
1007      if (! "body".equals(in))
1008         name = value;
1009      return this;
1010   }
1011
1012   /**
1013    * Bean property setter:  <property>pattern</property>.
1014    *
1015    * @param value
1016    *    The new value for this property.
1017    *    <br>This string SHOULD be a valid regular expression.
1018    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1019    * @return This object.
1020    */
1021   public ParameterInfo setPattern(String value) {
1022      pattern = value;
1023      return this;
1024   }
1025
1026   /**
1027    * Bean property setter:  <property>required</property>.
1028    *
1029    * <p>
1030    * Determines whether this parameter is mandatory.
1031    *
1032    * @param value
1033    *    The new value for this property.
1034    *    <br>If the parameter is <c>in</c> <js>"path"</js>, this property is required and its value MUST be <jk>true</jk>.
1035    *    <br>Otherwise, the property MAY be included and its default value is <jk>false</jk>.
1036    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1037    * @return This object.
1038    */
1039   public ParameterInfo setRequired(Boolean value) {
1040      required = value;
1041      return this;
1042   }
1043
1044   /**
1045    * Bean property setter:  <property>schema</property>.
1046    *
1047    * <p>
1048    * The schema defining the type used for the body parameter.
1049    *
1050    * @param value
1051    *    The new value for this property.
1052    *    <br>Property value is required.
1053    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1054    * @return This object.
1055    */
1056   public ParameterInfo setSchema(SchemaInfo value) {
1057      schema = value;
1058      return this;
1059   }
1060
1061   /**
1062    * Bean property setter:  <property>type</property>.
1063    *
1064    * <p>
1065    * The type of the parameter.
1066    *
1067    * @param value
1068    *    The new value for this property.
1069    *    <br>Valid values:
1070    *    <ul>
1071    *       <li><js>"string"</js>
1072    *       <li><js>"number"</js>
1073    *       <li><js>"integer"</js>
1074    *       <li><js>"boolean"</js>
1075    *       <li><js>"array"</js>
1076    *       <li><js>"file"</js>
1077    *    </ul>
1078    *    <br>If type is <js>"file"</js>, the <c>consumes</c> MUST be either <js>"multipart/form-data"</js>, <js>"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"</js>
1079    *       or both and the parameter MUST be <c>in</c> <js>"formData"</js>.
1080    *    <br>Property value is required.
1081    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1082    * @return This object.
1083    */
1084   public ParameterInfo setType(String value) {
1085      if (isStrict() && ! contains(value, VALID_TYPES))
1086         throw rex("Invalid value passed in to setType(String).  Value=''{0}'', valid values={1}", value, Json5.DEFAULT.of(VALID_TYPES));
1087      type = value;
1088      return this;
1089   }
1090
1091   /**
1092    * Bean property setter:  <property>uniqueItems</property>.
1093    *
1094    * @param value The new value for this property.
1095    * @return This object.
1096    */
1097   public ParameterInfo setUniqueItems(Boolean value) {
1098      uniqueItems = value;
1099      return this;
1100   }
1101
1102   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
1103   public ParameterInfo strict() {
1104      super.strict();
1105      return this;
1106   }
1107
1108   /**
1109    * Sets strict mode on this bean.
1110    *
1111    * @param value
1112    *    The new value for this property.
1113    *    <br>Non-boolean values will be converted to boolean using <code>Boolean.<jsm>valueOf</jsm>(value.toString())</code>.
1114    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (interpreted as <jk>false</jk>).
1115    * @return This object.
1116    */
1117   @Override
1118   public ParameterInfo strict(Object value) {
1119      super.strict(value);
1120      return this;
1121   }
1122}
